title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zebronics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
